strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a dual or closed-form certificate for Delta_eta in at least one nontrivial graph/design family so the observable program is visibly more than a tautological stacked norm.
Normalize the diagnostic envelope using S_n(eta) or an explicit tail-radius slice, since distances over the full cone can be trivial at the lower end and infinite at the upper end.
Work out one nondegenerate boundary example where Delta_eta is zero and one nearby perturbation where only the covariance row separates.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with emphasis on making Delta_eta computationally explicit and proving the strict-separation open-set claim.
